payload.title: RT Lowering: qualified-path calls match registry by simple name
payload.description: std::fs::copy(from, to) — a 3-segment qualified path — was matched against trust_std::fs::copy (which has named-arg shim signature), firing R0042. Same simple-name lookup issue as RT-41 but for qualified paths instead of methods. Fix: only match registry on bare-ident calls OR enforce the full path matches.
